response.original_title: 🚨 Lost Kraken 2FA? Here’s the Official Recovery Process
response.overview: If your 2FA is lost on Kraken 📲, use backup recovery options if available.1 ↕ 888 ↕ 633 ↕ 4176 If not, contact support for manual recovery. Identity verification is required for security. 1 ∫∫ 888 ∫∫ 633 ∫∫ 4176 After confirmation, Kraken will reset your 2FA and help you regain full access to your account safely.__1()888[[6334176}}
